arts.ttl: Liverpool draw PSG, Arsenal face PSV, Villa meet Club Brugge in last 16
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Look to Embarrass? Spurs Target £62M-Rated Wolves Star Amid Aston Villa, PSG Interest
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers have locked in Matheus Cunha with a long-term contract extension despite strong interest in him during the winter transfer window. Still, rumors about his future persist. Cunha has become a key player for Wolves, thriving in various attacking roles. arts.ttl: Arne Slot delivers verdict on Liverpool drawing PSG in Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool will face PSG in a two-legged Champions League round of 16 tie.

arts.sum: In recent transfer windows, Paris Saint-Germain has focused on young talents who are just starting to tap into their potential. This winter, the Ligue 1 club added Khvicha Kvaratskhelia from Napoli to their roster. Kvaratskhelia joins recent signings Willian Pacho and João Neves. arts.ttl: Liverpool Stat Could Prove Problematic for PSG in Upcoming Champions League Tie
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will take on Premier League leaders Liverpool in the UEFA Champions League Round of 16.
